lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee har ras paaeaa naam padaarath nau nidh paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have obtained the sublime essence of the Lord; I have received the wealth of the Naam and the nine treasures. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam sach saachaa naau |
lines.english: Those whose karma and Dharma - whose actions and faith - are in the True Name of the True Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo har raate se jan paravaan |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Lord are accepted and respected.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa kai sad balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਰਮ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin kee sangat param nidhaan |2|
lines.english: In their company, the supreme wealth is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har siau raatee sabad veechaaree |
lines.english: She is imbued with the Lord, and she reflects upon the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਧਨ ਨਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har var jin paaeaa dhan naaree |
lines.english: Blessed is that bride, who has obtained the Lord as her Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sangat kul taarai |
lines.english: She saves herself, and saves her family and friends as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਤ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam sanjam sat bhaau |
lines.english: The love of the Truth is my karma and Dharma - my faith and my actions, and my self-control.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur sev tat veechaarai |3|
lines.english: She serves the True Guru, and contemplates the essence of reality. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੀ ਜਾਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hamaree jaat pat sach naau |
lines.english: The True Name is my social status and honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਮੇਟੇ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: doojaa mette eko soe |4|14|
lines.english: The One Lord erases duality. ||4||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸੇ ਪੂਛ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhase poochh na hoe |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who is forgiven by the Lord is not called to account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik aaveh ik jaaveh aaee |
lines.english: Some come, and after they come, they go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਧਰਨਿ ਗਗਨ ਮਹਿ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik dharan gagan meh tthaur na paaveh |
lines.english: Some find no place of rest at all, on the earth or in the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik har raate raheh samaaee |
lines.english: Some are imbued with the Lord; they remain absorbed in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਕਰਮਹੀਣ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: se karamaheen har naam na dhiaaveh |1|
lines.english: Those who do not meditate on the Name of the Lord are the most unfortunate. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te gat mit paaee |
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, the way to salvation is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਵਤ ਅਤਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu sansaar bikh vat at bhaujal gurasabadee har paar langhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This world is a terrifying ocean of poison; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord helps us cross over. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਪੇਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin kau kaal na saakai pel |
lines.english: cannot be crushed by death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਲਏ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jina kau aap le prabh mel |
lines.english: Those, whom God unites with Himself,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰਹਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh niramal raheh piaare |
lines.english: The beloved Gurmukhs remain immaculately pure,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਅੰਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਮਲ ਨਿਰਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau jal anbh aoopar kamal niraare |2|
lines.english: like the lotus in the water, which remains untouched. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਸੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਲਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: deesai braham guramukh sach laheeai |
lines.english: Behold the Lord God; the truth is revealed to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਰਾ ਭਲਾ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: buraa bhalaa kahu kis no kaheeai |
lines.english: Tell me: who should we call good or bad?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥਉ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: akath kthau guramat veechaar |
lines.english: I speak the Unspoken Speech of the Lord, contemplating the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ ਬੇਦ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਭੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: saasat bed sinmrit bahu bhed |
lines.english: The Shaastras, the Vedas, the Simritees and all their many secrets;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਉ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mil gur sangat paavau paar |3|
lines.english: I join the Sangat, the Guru's Congregation, and I find God's limits. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਰੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth majan har ras red |
lines.english: bathing at the sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage - all this is found by enshrining the sublime essence of the Lord in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh niramal mail na laagai |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are immaculately pure; no filth sticks to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡੇ ਧੁਰਿ ਭਾਗੈ ॥੪॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak hiradai naam vadde dhur bhaagai |4|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides in the heart, by the greatest pre-ordained destiny. ||4||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੇਖਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karat beechaar hiradai har raviaa hiradai dekh beechaariaa |1|
lines.english: Through contemplation and meditation, the Lord dwells within the heart; see this, and understand. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਪਾਇ ਲਗਉ ਗੁਰ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਨਿਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: niv niv paae lgau gur apune aatam raam nihaariaa |
lines.english: Bowing down, again and again, I fall at the Feet of my Guru; through Him, I have seen the Lord, the Divine Self, within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਹੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bolahu raam kare nisataaraa |
lines.english: So speak the Lord's Name, which shall emancipate you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਭੈ ਮਿਟੈ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਉਜੀਆਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad ratan har laabhai mittai agiaan hoe ujeeaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the jewel of the Lord is found; ignorance is dispelled, and the Divine Light shines forth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਨੀ ਰਵੈ ਬੰਧਨ ਨਹੀ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ravanee ravai bandhan nahee tootteh vich haumai bharam na jaaee |
lines.english: By merely saying it with the tongue, one's bonds are not broken, and egotism and doubt do not depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਹਉਮੈ ਤੂਟੈ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਲੇਖੈ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta haumai toottai taa ko lekhai paaee |2|
lines.english: But when one meets the True Guru, egotism departs, and then, one realizes his destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal jagajeevan daataa mat guramat har nisataare |3|
lines.english: The Lover of His devotees, the Life of the World, the Lord bestows the Guru's Teachings upon the intellect, and one is emancipated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam bhagat pria preetam sukh saagar ur dhaare |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is sweet and dear to His devotees; it is the ocean of peace - enshrine it within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਜੂਝਿ ਮਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਏ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man siau joojh marai prabh paae manasaa maneh samaae |
lines.english: One who dies fighting against his own stubborn mind finds God, and the desires of the mind are quieted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਸਹਜ ਭਾਇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥੪॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak kripaa kare jagajeevan sehaj bhaae liv laae |4|16|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the Life of the World bestows His Mercy, one is intuitively attuned to the Love of the Lord. ||4||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਕਹਹਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਹਿ ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਕਿਸੁ ਸਮਝਾਵਹਿ ਸਮਝਿ ਰਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: kis kau kaheh sunaaveh kis kau kis samajhaaveh samajh rahe |
lines.english: Unto whom do they speak? Unto whom do they preach? Who understands? Let them understand themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੈ ਪੜਾਵਹਿ ਪੜਿ ਗੁਣਿ ਬੂਝੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਰਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kisai parraaveh parr gun boojhe satigur sabad santokh rahe |1|
lines.english: Who do they teach? Through study, they come to realize the Lord's Glorious Virtues. Through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru, they come to dwell in contentment. ||1||
